message:
test(wave-42): add 8 pure data-type tests across 4 modules

sync/pool: WarmupStrategy, DestroyReason, PoolStats trait coverage.

sync/once_cell: OnceCellError Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/Display.

channel/clock_skew: ClockSkewStatsSnapshot and ClockSkewConfig
Debug/Clone/Eq trait coverage.

channel/fault: FaultChannelConfig and FaultChannelStats
Debug/Clone/Default/Display trait coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
